name: Ganjoor
tagline: Read classic Persian poetry, poets, and Hafez fortunes
description: Retrieve Ganjoor's catalog of classical Persian poets, categories (books), and individual poems with verses, recitations, images, and songs. All documented read routes are anonymous and require no API key.

auth.hint: The documented poet, category, poem, and Faal read routes are decorated AllowAnonymous in the official GanjoorService source and were confirmed reachable without any credential.

tools.name: list_poets
tools.description: List published Ganjoor poets without their biography text.

tools.name: get_poet
tools.description: Retrieve one poet's profile by numeric identifier.

params.name: catPoems
params.description: When true, includes the poet's root category poems; defaults to false in the official source.

tools.name: get_category
tools.description: Retrieve one poetry book/category (and optionally its poems) by numeric identifier.

params.name: poems
params.description: Whether to include the category's poem list; defaults to true in the official source.

params.name: mainSections
params.description: Whether to include only main subsections; defaults to false in the official source.

tools.name: get_poem
tools.description: Retrieve one poem by numeric identifier with verses and related content.

params.name: verseDetails
params.description: Whether to include per-verse detail objects; defaults to true in the official source.

params.name: recitations
params.description: Whether to include audio recitations; defaults to true in the official source.

params.name: images
params.description: Whether to include related manuscript images; defaults to true in the official source.

params.name: songs
params.description: Whether to include related music tracks; defaults to true in the official source.

params.name: comments
params.description: Whether to include user comments; defaults to true in the official source.

tools.name: get_random_poem
tools.description: Retrieve a random poem from a given poet.

params.name: poetId
params.description: Poet identifier to pick a random poem from.

tools.name: get_hafez_faal
tools.description: Get a random Hafez poem used as a traditional Persian fortune-telling reading (Faal-e Hafez).
